# muvon/octocode

Installs the octocode CLI (code indexing and search tool by Muvon)

## Key Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `octocode` | Run octocode |
| `octocode --help` | Show help and available options |
| `octocode --version` | Show installed version |

## Common Usage

```bash
# Check if installed
octocode --version

# Show help
octocode --help
```
